programme.title: Fitness Mantra-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: All hell breaks loose after Kanishk appoints Pinky as the new fitness coach.

programme.title: Fitness Mantra-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: All hell breaks loose after Kanishk appoints Pinky as the new fitness coach.

programme.title: Egg Game-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Kanishk gives the children the task of protecting an egg in order to adopt a puppy.

programme.title: No Noise Day-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Frustrated by the loud sound of the school band, Kanishk introduces a no noise rule.

programme.title: Champ-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Everyone gears up for the table tennis tournament in order to win the coveted prize.

programme.title: Wipe Out-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Dr J terrorises the children by sending Dhulaisur when they get their clothes dirty.

programme.title: Titoo Ki Bachat-Titoo
programme.desc: Tito's mother instructs everyone to follow measures in order to save electricity. S07E03.

programme.title: Powerful Shera-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera becomes very powerful after accidentally consuming the wrong drink. S07E05.

programme.title: Bahadur Ki Bahaduri-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S07E07.

programme.title: Titoo Ka Cousin Neemku-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's assignment to speak kindly is put to the test when his blunt cousin arrives. S07E09.

programme.title: Jodi No 1-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo accidentally gets glue on his uniform and causes chaos at home. S07E13.

programme.title: Caring Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean is forced to care for the injured Mrs Wicket but her demands become troublesome. S02E24.

programme.title: Opera Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean is mistaken for a celebrity while going to the opera. S02E25.

programme.title: Taxi Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean ends up becoming a taxi driver when he heads out to buy a toy car. S02E26.

programme.title: Muscle Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean needs to impress Irma, who is infatuated with the hunky delivery man. S02E27.

programme.title: A New Friend-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: The seagull in the flat is actually a cuckoo in the nest taking over Bean's home. S02E28.

programme.title: The Lift-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean gets himself caught in a lift and he starts to annoy the other passengers. S02E29.
